title: BetterWaystonesMenu - Conversion
description: This mod adds Better menu to waystones, sortable waystones, scrollable waystones. It has the same feature as the original Forge version. This is just Fabric version of the mod. Credit goes to the respective creator, Loxoz.
body:
# Ported to Fabric. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/betterwaystonesmenu 

UNTESTED on MULTIPLAYER.

# Features:

- Scrollable UI

- Edit Mode: allows you to drag and drop the waystone index order.

- The rest of the Waystones original features are still intact, you can also
use the old UI back.

These are the same features as the original creator made (Loxoz).
